security_gap.gap_description: Distributor contract or Backend Service (ID 14) providing proofs is vulnerable to DoS attacks.

actor_risk.description: User relies on service availability to claim rewards.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Prevents users from accessing earned rewards temporarily.

assumptions: Attacker has sufficient resources to flood the claim function or the Backend Service providing proofs.
The Distributor contract or Backend Service lacks sufficient rate limiting or DoS protection.

mitigation.strategy: Implement rate limiting on the claim endpoint; ensure Backend Service has robust DoS protection.

description: User is unable to claim earned incentives/fees due to a Denial of Service attack on the claiming mechanism or the proof-generating service.
